{{Quote|…and in return, of course, we'll concede the territory that we captured in Palesia.|[[Myk'chur Finux Zug]] of the Red Iaro|<ref name="SW15" />}}
'''Palesia''' was a territory on the<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lannik/Legends|Lannik]]. During the [[Lannik civil war|conflict]] between the [[Red Iaro/Legends|Red Iaro]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] organization and the [[Lannik High Court|Lannik government]], the terrorists captured the region from loyalist forces, but offered to cede the territory in [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]-mediated [[Lannik–Red Iaro peace negotiations|peace talks]]<ref name="SW15" /> on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] planet [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]].<ref name="SW13">[[Star Wars (1998) 13|''Star Wars'' (1998) 13]]</ref> Red Iaro representative [[Myk'chur Finux Zug]]'s negotiation with lands legally belonging to the Lannik crown outraged [[Lannik (species)/Legends|Lannik]] [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[R'cardo Sooflie IX]], who took offense and discontinued negotiations.<ref name="SW15" />

[[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] [[Journalist/Legends|journalists]] reported from Palesia on the discovery that successful [[pugil]] [[athlete]] [[Rolsat Noviee]], supposedly Lannik, was in fact a [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]] [[Changeling/Legends|changeling]].<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|sports/13516_1.html|Noviee Exposed as a Changeling}}</ref>
